# TEM Rush Character Models — Manifest

All models sourced from **Kenney Blocky Characters 2.0** pack.

- **Source URL:** https://kenney.nl/assets/blocky-characters
- **Direct download:** https://kenney.nl/media/pages/assets/blocky-characters/72bdc6be4c-1749547469/kenney_blocky-characters_20.zip
- **License:** Creative Commons Zero (CC0) — https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
- **Creator:** Kenney (www.kenney.nl)
- **Format:** GLB (binary GLTF)
- **Pack version:** 2.0 (released 10-06-2025)

> CC0 = fully free for commercial use, no attribution required (though crediting Kenney is appreciated).

---

## Character Assignments

| File | Source variant | Assigned character | Appearance | Notes |
|------|---------------|-------------------|------------|-------|
| `trump.glb` | character-d | **Trump** | All gold/yellow blocky figure — closest to orange caricature | Swap skin texture for orange when customising |
| `elon.glb` | character-j | **Elon Musk** | Dark navy outfit, cap-like head, light skin | Navy/uniform look = tech billionaire |
| `karen.glb` | character-i | **Karen** | Blonde/light hair, light blue top, peach skin | Closest female-ish blonde character |
| `flat-earther.glb` | character-b | **Flat Earther** | Red top, dark hair, light skin | Eccentric colour; add tinfoil hat via code |
| `anti-vaxxer.glb` | character-c | **Anti-vaxxer** | Ginger/orange hair, green top, tan pants | Hippy casual vibe |
| `crypto-bro.glb` | character-g | **Crypto Bro** | Colourful patterned/magenta outfit | Loud flashy colours = crypto energy |
| `zuckerberg.glb` | character-p | **Zuckerberg** | Plain blue shirt, light skin, brown hair | Basic generic look = robotic Zuck |
| `alex-jones.glb` | character-k | **Alex Jones** | Red shirt, brown hair, beard/dark facial features | Big guy, red shirt, beard = perfect match |
| `kanye.glb` | character-r | **Kanye West** | All black/dark outfit, dark skin, dark hair | All-black = Ye aesthetic |
| `conspiracy-guy.glb` | character-q | **Conspiracy Guy** | Dark formal suit/jacket, dark skin, dark hair | Dark formal coat = trench coat energy |

| `blocky-variant-m.glb` | character-m | Dark skin, teal shirt, dark pants |

---

## Integration Notes

- All models are **rigged with a standard humanoid skeleton** — compatible with Three.js SkeletonUtils
- Models are ~111KB each (very lightweight for web)
- To customise characters further: override materials/textures in Three.js code, or add props (hats, accessories) as child meshes
- Animation: these are static posed models. Pair with Kenney's animation FBX files or Mixamo animations retargeted to the skeleton
- The Kenney Animated Characters 1 & 2 packs (`kenney_animated-characters-1.zip` / `kenney_animated-characters-2.zip`) contain matching FBX skeletons + `idle.fbx`, `run.fbx`, `jump.fbx` animations that can be applied

---

| Kenney Animated Characters 1 | https://kenney.nl/media/pages/assets/animated-characters-1/8c3221c3de-1694862559/kenney_animated-characters-1.zip | FBX model + idle/run/jump animations + skins: survivor, zombie |

These FBX packs are for animation data only (not copied here — GLB format preferred for Three.js).
